food_health_benefits: Low calorie snack

food_features.texture: crispy shell with liquid and soft filling
food_features.appearance: small round crispy balls filled with green/brown liquid

food_description: A Sri Lankan dish made from godamba roti (a type of flatbread) and vegetables, egg and/or meat, and spices, chopped rapidly on a heated iron sheet.
food_health_benefits: High in protein and carbohydrates for energy

food_features.texture: chewy bread bits with crisp vegetables
food_features.appearance: shredded bread mixed with meat and vegetables

food_description: A type of pancake originating from South India and Sri Lanka, made with fermented rice batter and coconut milk, often bowl-shaped.
food_health_benefits: Gluten-free and easily digestible

food_features.texture: crispy edges with a soft, spongy center
food_features.appearance: bowl-shaped pale pancake with brown edges

food_description: A sweet pudding of South African origin. It contains apricot jam and has a spongy caramelized texture, often served with custard or ice cream.
food_health_benefits: Comfort food providing quick energy

food_features.appearance: dark brown sponge cake soaked in sauce

food_description: A Cambodian national dish consisting of fish coated in a thick coconut milk with kroeung (a Khmer curry paste), either steamed or baked in a cup made from banana leaves.
food_health_benefits: High in protein and healthy fats from coconut

food_features.appearance: yellow-orange thick curry set in a banana leaf bowl

food_description: A contemporary Hawaiian dish consisting of white rice topped with a hamburger patty, a fried egg, and brown gravy.
food_health_benefits: High energy comfort food

food_features.texture: soft rice mixed with juicy meat and runny egg yolk
food_features.appearance: stacked dish smothered in dark gravy

food_description: A Hawaiian dish of diced raw fish served either as an appetizer or as a main course, heavily influenced by Japanese and other Asian cuisines.
food_health_benefits: Rich in lean protein and Omega-3 fatty acids

food_features.texture: soft fish with crunchy nuts over warm rice
food_features.appearance: colorful bowl of raw fish cubes over rice

food_description: A Native Hawaiian dish consisting of pork wrapped in taro leaf, traditionally cooked in an underground imu oven.
food_health_benefits: High in protein, taro leaves provide fiber and vitamins

food_features.texture: very tender, fall-apart meat wrapped in soft leaves

food_description: A traditional Georgian dish of cheese-filled bread. The bread is leavened and allowed to rise, shaped in various ways, usually with cheese and an egg in the middle.
food_health_benefits: High calorie comfort food, providing calcium and protein

food_features.texture: crusty bread with a gooey, molten center
food_features.appearance: boat-shaped bread holding melted cheese and a soft egg yolk

food_description: A Georgian dumpling, which originated in the Georgian mountain regions, typically filled with spiced meat, and uniquely eaten by sucking the juices out first.
food_health_benefits: Balanced macros of carbs and protein

food_features.texture: thick dough knot holding a juicy meat center
food_features.appearance: large pleated dumpling with a thick top knot

food_description: A type of Chinese steamed bun from Jiangnan region, known for its delicate skin and hot soup inside the meat filling.
food_health_benefits: Moderate calories, high in protein

food_features.texture: soft skin filled with a burst of hot soup and tender meat
food_features.appearance: small white pleated dumpling sitting in a bamboo steamer
